---
title: "Instructor Only: Composition And Proportions Practice"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    toc: true
---

```{r}
#| include: false
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = normalizePath("../../../.."))
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
```

# Worked Reference

```{r}
census <- readr::read_csv("data/real/census_state_race_ethnicity_long.csv")

selected_states <- census |>
  rename(race_ethnicity_proportion = share) |>
  filter(state %in% c("CA", "FL", "MD", "MA", "TX", "WA"))

ggplot(selected_states, aes(x = state_name, y = race_ethnicity_proportion, fill = race_ethnicity)) +
  geom_col() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(round(x * 100), "%")) +
  labs(
    title = "Race/Ethnicity Composition In Selected States",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Proportion of included race/ethnicity population",
    fill = "Category"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
